title: Pugmeowla's Infintrix
description: Adds compatibility from Pugmeowla's Infinity Stone Core to Alien Evo, Reds Omnitrix Evolution and ITO
body:
The mod adds compatibility between Pugmeowla’s Infinity Stone Core and multiple Omnitrix mods, including Alien Evo, Red’s Omnitrix Evolution, and ITO.

The initial release focuses on basic functionality, allowing players to insert and remove Infinity Stones, with no visuals at first. Later updates aim to introduce custom visual “gauntlet-style” Omnitrixes where the stones are visibly rendered on the devices.

Players will not be able to use Infinity Stones while transformed into an alien.

Future plans may include a separate addon that converts Omnitrixes into gauntlet-like items (such as Prototype, 10K, Recalibrated, Ultimatrix, and others), eliminating the need to equip or remove a gauntlet when transforming, while also improving visuals.

The project is still in development, with updates depending on availability.

Update: The first release now includes visuals for the Prototype and Evolved Omnitrix.
